title: Payment Integration
description: As a user I want this to be completed as early as possible
acceptanceCriteria: Given the user is on the checkout page, When they select a payment method, Then the method should be saved for the transaction.
Given the user has entered valid payment details, When they submit the payment, Then the payment should be processed successfully.
Given the payment is successful, When the transaction completes, Then the user should receive a confirmation email.
Given the payment fails, When the transaction does not complete, Then the user should receive an error message with retry options.

title: Paris Tour
acceptanceCriteria: Given a user is on the travel website, When they search for 'Paris Tour', Then they should see a list of available tours in Paris.
Given a user has selected a Paris tour, When they click on 'Book Now', Then they should be taken to the booking page.
Given a user is on the booking page, When they enter valid payment details, Then the payment should be processed successfully.
Given a user has completed booking, When they check their email, Then they should receive a booking confirmation email.
Given a user wants to cancel a booking, When they click on 'Cancel Booking', Then the booking should be cancelled and a confirmation email sent.

title: dashboard design
acceptanceCriteria: Given a user is logged in, When they navigate to the dashboard, Then they should see a summary of their recent activities.
Given a user is on the dashboard, When they select a specific date range, Then the dashboard should update to display data for that range.
Given a user is on the dashboard, When they click on a specific data point, Then they should see detailed information about that data point.
Given a user is on the dashboard, When they refresh the page, Then the dashboard should retain the current state and data.
Given a user is on the dashboard, When there is no data available, Then they should see an appropriate message indicating no data is available.
